svg.title: Activity pulse report for 2026-03-08 through 2026-03-21
svg.desc: A styled chart comparing company repository commit volume and gameplay child repository commit volume for each day from March 8 through March 21, 2026.
svg.text: ONIZUKA Game AGI Co. Memory Report
Foundation, operating-system pivot, and child-repo delivery across a 14-day span
Stacked bars: cyan = gameplay child repos, amber = company repo

g.text: 03/08-03/11 = company OS plus in-main prototype work.
03/13 adds execution guardrails before the burst.
Quiet days stay quiet; no backfill claims.

svg.text: Evidence rule: days without a local daily folder are shown explicitly as quiet or missing-record days instead of being inferred from later snapshots.
